description: arXiv:2607.09936v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Cybersecurity systems must adapt rapidly to emerging threats. However, labeled data for new threat categories is unavailable when those threats first appear. Generalized zero-shot learning offers a natural solution by enabling recognition of unseen classes through auxiliary semantic knowledge rather than labeled examples. Large language models a...
author: Ivan Alejandro Montoya Sanchez, Anantaa Kotal, Aritran Piplai
